---
title: "Take Home Exercise 01"
author: "Dew Stella Chan"
execute: 
  eval: true
  echo: true
  message: false
  freeze: true
---
```{r}
pacman::p_load(sf, sp, raster, spatstat, tmap, tidyverse)
set.seed(1234) #set seed to ensure the result is consistant
```


```{r}
rdacc_sf <-read_csv("data/thai_road_accident_2019_2022.csv") %>%
  filter(!is.na(longitude) & longitude != "", 
         !is.na(latitude)& latitude != "") %>%
  st_as_sf(coords= c("longitude", "latitude"),crs =4326) %>%
  st_transform(crs=32647) #transforming to geographic data.
```
